title: Les Yeux d'Argos
collaboration: Online Dance Performance by Selma and Soufiane Ouissi
description:
Software suite developed in MaxMSP-Jitter to allow two dancers to perform together from remote locations 
                            / Linux icecast server setup
                        	/ Editable cues for playback triggers & smooth transitions
                        	/ The result of the performance is only visible online
longDescription:
Software suite developed in MaxMSP-Jitter to allow two dancers to perform together from remote locations 
                            / Linux icecast server setup
                        	/ Editable cues for playback triggers & smooth transitions
                        	/ The result of the performance is only visible online
